name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich W/Tarragon Mayo
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole bone-in chicken breasts (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar and tarragon in a saucepan. Bring to boil and cook until reduced by half.
2. Melt butter in a skillet. Saute shallots until tender.
3. Mix mayo, tarragon reduction, shallots, and white pepper well.
4. Remove skin and fat from chicken.
5. Pound chicken slightly with the fine side of a meat tenderizing mallet.
6. Cut chicken in half along the natural seam, removing any cartilage at the center.
7. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
8. Grill chicken over medium heat, turning occasionally and basting with reserved mayo mixture on each side.
9. Slice tomatoes if desired and warm buns.
10. Spread flavored mayo generously inside of buns.
11. Place 2 chicken slices onto one bun, top with lettuce and tomato, then cover with the other half of the bun.
